configurations.name: esp32-dash
runtimeArgs: process.chdir('/Users/corts/Documents/GitHub/DPA-AUP/firmware/dpa-esp32');const h=require('http'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path');let favs=[];let adminMode=false;let meshEnabled=false;let meshRole='auto';let st={name:'dpa-device',ver:'2.3.0',env:'dev',duid:'DPA-AB12',admin:false,ble:false,wifi:true,ip:'192.168.4.1',sta:{connected:false,ssid:'',ip:'',rssi:0},uptime_s:0,battery:{voltage:3.95,percent:87,charging:false},audio:{volume:70,eq:'flat',mode:'normal',a2dp:'disconnected',a2dpDevice:''},storage:{totalMB:1890,usedMB:124,freeMB:1766,trackCount:3,capsuleCount:4,videoCount:1},espnow:{active:false,enabled:false,role:'auto',peers:0,peerList:[]},player:{trackIndex:0,trackId:'/tracks/neon_rain.wav',nowPlaying:'',playing:false,posMs:0,durationMs:0},counts:{play:0,pause:0,next:0,prev:0},favorites:{items:[]},led:{idle:{color:'#ff4bcb',pattern:'breathing'},playback:{color:'#00f1df',pattern:'comet'},charging:{color:'#ffcc33',pattern:'breathing'}},dcnp:{concert:'#ff3366',video:'#3366ff',merch:'#33ff99',signing:'#ffcc00',remix:'#cc33ff',other:'#ffffff'}};const wavs=[{path:'/tracks/neon_rain.wav',size:8600000,sampleRate:44100,channels:2,bitsPerSample:16,durationMs:234000},{path:'/tracks/cyber_heart.wav',size:7200000,sampleRate:44100,channels:2,bitsPerSample:16,durationMs:198000},{path:'/tracks/analog_dreams.wav',size:9800000,sampleRate:48000,channels:2,bitsPerSample:24,durationMs:267000}];const tks=[{index:0,filename:'t1.dpa',title:'Neon Rain',artist:'Cort Knoxx',sizeMB:8.2,plays:1247,durationMs:234000,explicit:false},{index:1,filename:'t2.dpa',title:'Cyber Heart',artist:'Cort Knoxx',sizeMB:6.9,plays:8432,durationMs:198000,explicit:true},{index:2,filename:'t3.dpa',title:'Analog Dreams',artist:'Cort Knoxx',sizeMB:9.4,plays:3891,durationMs:267000,explicit:false}];const caps=[{id:'c1',type:'concert',title:'Midnight Tour - NYC',desc:'VIP meet & greet pass + backstage access. Includes front-row seating and exclusive merch pickup.',date:'2026-03-10',delivered:true},{id:'c2',type:'video',title:'Behind the Synths',desc:'Exclusive studio session footage showing the making of The Wack Game.',date:'2026-03-08',delivered:true},{id:'c3',type:'merch',title:'Holographic Vinyl Drop',desc:'Limited edition holographic pressing. Only 500 units worldwide.',date:'2026-03-05',delivered:true},{id:'c4',type:'remix',title:'Neon Rain (VIP Remix)',desc:'Unreleased VIP remix with extended outro and new vocal layers.',date:'2026-03-01',delivered:false}];const mockNets=[{ssid:'HomeNetwork',rssi:-42,open:false},{ssid:'Neighbors_5G',rssi:-67,open:false},{ssid:'CoffeeShop',rssi:-73,open:true},{ssid:'FBI_Van',rssi:-81,open:false}];const boot=Date.now();let playStart=0;h.createServer((q,r)=>{const u=new URL(q.url,'http://localhost');r.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin','*');r.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods','GET,POST,DELETE,OPTIONS');r.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers','Content-Type');if(q.method==='OPTIONS'){r.writeHead(204);r.end();return}st.uptime_s=Math.floor((Date.now()-boot)/1000);st.admin=adminMode;if(st.player.playing){st.player.posMs=Math.min(Date.now()-playStart,st.player.durationMs)}st.favorites.items=favs;st.espnow.active=meshEnabled;st.espnow.enabled=meshEnabled;st.espnow.role=meshRole;if(u.pathname==='/api/status'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify(st))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/admin/unlock'){const key=u.searchParams.get('key')||'';if(key===st.duid){adminMode=true;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,admin:true}))}else{r.writeHead(403,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:false,error:'invalid key'}))}}else if(u.pathname==='/api/admin/lock'){adminMode=false;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,admin:false}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/espnow/status'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({active:meshEnabled,enabled:meshEnabled,role:meshRole,isMaster:meshRole==='master'||(meshRole==='auto'&&st.player.playing),name:st.duid,peers:0,peerList:[]}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/espnow/enable'){meshEnabled=true;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,active:true}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/espnow/disable'){meshEnabled=false;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,active:false}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/espnow/role'){meshRole=u.searchParams.get('role')||'auto';r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,role:meshRole,isMaster:meshRole==='master'}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/espnow/peers'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({active:meshEnabled,enabled:meshEnabled,role:meshRole,peers:0,peerList:[]}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/audio/features'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});const playing=st.player.playing;r.end(JSON.stringify({active:playing,peakL:playing?0.3+Math.random()*0.5:0,peakR:playing?0.3+Math.random()*0.5:0,rms:playing?0.15+Math.random()*0.3:0,envelope:playing?0.2+Math.random()*0.4:0,bassEnergy:playing?0.1+Math.random()*0.6:0,beat:playing&&Math.random()>0.85}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/analytics'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({tracks:[{idx:0,plays:12,skips:2,listenMs:2808000,rating:4},{idx:1,plays:84,skips:5,listenMs:16632000,rating:5},{idx:2,plays:39,skips:8,listenMs:10413000,rating:3}]}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/playlist/mode'){const mode=u.searchParams.get('mode')||'normal';st.audio.mode=mode;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,mode:mode}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/playlist/order'){const order=st.audio.mode==='smart'?[1,0,2]:st.audio.mode==='smart_shuffle'?[1,2,0]:[0,1,2];r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({mode:st.audio.mode,order:order}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/audio/wavs'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({wavs:wavs}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/favorites'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({favorites:favs}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/favorites/toggle'){const file=u.searchParams.get('file')||'';const idx=favs.indexOf(file);if(idx>=0){favs.splice(idx,1);r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,file:file,favorite:false}))}else{favs.push(file);r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,file:file,favorite:true}))}}else if(u.pathname==='/api/tracks'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({tracks:tks}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/capsules'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({capsules:caps}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/audio/play'){const file=u.searchParams.get('file')||'';const wi=wavs.findIndex(w=>w.path===file);if(wi>=0){st.player.trackIndex=wi;st.player.trackId=file;st.player.nowPlaying=file;st.player.playing=true;st.player.durationMs=wavs[wi].durationMs;st.player.posMs=0;playStart=Date.now();st.counts.play++}r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/audio/stop'){st.player.playing=false;st.player.nowPlaying='';st.player.posMs=0;st.counts.pause++;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/audio/seek'){const ms=parseInt(u.searchParams.get('ms')||'0');st.player.posMs=ms;playStart=Date.now()-ms;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/track'){const i=parseInt(u.searchParams.get('i')||'0');st.player.trackIndex=i;st.player.trackId=wavs[i].path;st.player.nowPlaying=wavs[i].path;st.player.playing=true;st.player.durationMs=wavs[i].durationMs;st.player.posMs=0;playStart=Date.now();st.counts.play++;r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/cmd'){const op=u.searchParams.get('op');if(op==='01'){st.player.playing=true;playStart=Date.now()-st.player.posMs;st.counts.play++}else if(op==='02'){st.player.playing=false;st.player.nowPlaying='';st.counts.pause++}else if(op==='03'){const ni=(st.player.trackIndex+1)%3;st.player.trackIndex=ni;st.player.trackId=wavs[ni].path;st.player.nowPlaying=wavs[ni].path;st.player.playing=true;st.player.durationMs=wavs[ni].durationMs;st.player.posMs=0;playStart=Date.now();st.counts.next++}else if(op==='04'){const ni=(st.player.trackIndex+2)%3;st.player.trackIndex=ni;st.player.trackId=wavs[ni].path;st.player.nowPlaying=wavs[ni].path;st.player.playing=true;st.player.durationMs=wavs[ni].durationMs;st.player.posMs=0;playStart=Date.now();st.counts.prev++}r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/volume'){st.audio.volume=parseInt(u.searchParams.get('level')||'70');r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/eq'){st.audio.eq=u.searchParams.get('preset')||'flat';r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/mode'){st.audio.mode=u.searchParams.get('mode')||'normal';r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/storage'){if(!adminMode){r.writeHead(403,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"error":"admin mode required"}')}else{r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({sdMounted:true,totalMB:1890,usedMB:124,freeMB:1766,trackCount:3,capsuleCount:4,videoCount:1,sdSpeed:20000000,files:[{name:'neon_rain.wav',path:'/tracks/neon_rain.wav',size:8600000,isDir:false},{name:'cyber_heart.wav',path:'/tracks/cyber_heart.wav',size:7200000,isDir:false},{name:'analog_dreams.wav',path:'/tracks/analog_dreams.wav',size:9800000,isDir:false}]}))}}else if(u.pathname==='/api/wifi/status'){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ap:{ssid:st.duid,ip:'192.168.4.1',clients:1},sta:st.sta}))}else if(u.pathname==='/api/wifi/scan'){if(!adminMode){r.writeHead(403,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"error":"admin mode required"}')}else if(!global._scanDone){global._scanDone=false;setTimeout(()=>{global._scanDone=true},1500);r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({scanning:true,networks:[]}))}else{r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({scanning:false,networks:mockNets}));global._scanDone=false}}else if(u.pathname==='/api/wifi/connect'){if(!adminMode){r.writeHead(403,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"error":"admin mode required"}')}else{const ssid=u.searchParams.get('ssid')||'';const pass=u.searchParams.get('pass')||'';if(pass==='bad'||pass==='wrong'){st.sta={connected:false,ssid:'',ip:'',rssi:0};r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:false,ip:'',ssid:ssid}))}else{st.sta={connected:true,ssid:ssid,ip:'192.168.1.'+Math.floor(100+Math.random()*155),rssi:-45};r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end(JSON.stringify({ok:true,ip:st.sta.ip,ssid:ssid}))}}}else if(u.pathname==='/api/wifi/disconnect'){if(!adminMode){r.writeHead(403,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"error":"admin mode required"}')}else{st.sta={connected:false,ssid:'',ip:'',rssi:0};r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}}else if(u.pathname==='/api/led/preview'){const mode=u.searchParams.get('mode')||'idle';const color=u.searchParams.get('color');const pat=u.searchParams.get('pattern');const bright=u.searchParams.get('brightness');if(color){if(mode==='idle')st.led.idle.color=color;else if(mode==='playback')st.led.playback.color=color;else if(mode==='charging')st.led.charging.color=color}if(pat){if(mode==='idle')st.led.idle.pattern=pat;else if(mode==='playback')st.led.playback.pattern=pat;else if(mode==='charging')st.led.charging.pattern=pat}if(bright)st.brightness=parseInt(bright);r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')}else if(u.pathname==='/api/theme'&&q.method==='POST'){let body='';q.on('data',c=>body+=c);q.on('end',()=>{try{const t=JSON.parse(body);if(t.idle_color)st.led.idle.color=t.idle_color;if(t.idle_pattern)st.led.idle.pattern=t.idle_pattern;if(t.play_color)st.led.playback.color=t.play_color;if(t.play_pattern)st.led.playback.pattern=t.play_pattern;if(t.charge_color)st.led.charging.color=t.charge_color;if(t.charge_pattern)st.led.charging.pattern=t.charge_pattern;if(t.brightness!==undefined)st.brightness=t.brightness;if(t.dcnp_concert)st.dcnp.concert=t.dcnp_concert;if(t.dcnp_video)st.dcnp.video=t.dcnp_video;if(t.dcnp_merch)st.dcnp.merch=t.dcnp_merch;if(t.dcnp_signing)st.dcnp.signing=t.dcnp_signing;if(t.dcnp_remix)st.dcnp.remix=t.dcnp_remix;if(t.dcnp_other)st.dcnp.other=t.dcnp_other}catch(e){}r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'application/json'});r.end('{"ok":true}')});return}else{const fp=p.join(process.cwd(),'dashboard.html');if(f.existsSync(fp)){r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'text/html'});r.end(f.readFileSync(fp))}else{r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found')}}}).listen(4300,()=>console.log('ESP32 Mock on http://localhost:4300'))
